{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/248346576?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/PomPomSaturin", "id": 248346576, "login": "PomPomSaturin", "node_id": "U_kgDODs130A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/PomPomSaturin", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49262", "cvss": {"score": 3.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary
The administrative proxy route (`cmsproxy`) in Aimeos Pagible CMS is vulnerable to a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attack via DNS Rebinding. A Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition exists between the URL validation phase and the actual HTTP request phase, allowing attackers to access internal network resources and cloud metadata endpoints.

### Details
Before executing an HTTP request to fetch external content, the `AdminController::proxy` controller validates the target URL using `\Aimeos\Cms\Utils::isValidUrl($url)`. This function performs a DNS query to verify that the hostname does not resolve to private or reserved IP ranges (e.g., `127.0.0.1`, `10.0.0.0/8`, `169.254.169.254`). 

If the validation passes, the application proceeds to the "Use" phase, invoking Guzzle/cURL to send the request. However, Guzzle performs a *second* DNS lookup to establish the socket connection. 

An attacker can exploit this by setting up a malicious DNS server for a domain they control and configuring it with a TTL of 0. 
1. During the validation "Check", the DNS server returns a safe, public IP.
2. During the Guzzle "Use", the DNS server returns an internal/private IP.

  ### POC
1. Attacker registers `rebound.test.com with a custom nameserver.
2. Attacker generates a valid proxy token (assuming basic authenticated access).
3. Attacker requests `/cmsproxy?url=http://rebound.test.com`.
4. `isValidUrl` checks `rebound.test.com`. DNS returns `8.8.8.8`. Validation passes.
5. Guzzle requests `http://rebound.test.com`. DNS returns `169.254.169.254`.
6. The CMS fetches AWS Instance Metadata and returns it to the attacker.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mmj8-wcvw-6789", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T21:50:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mmj8-wcvw-6789", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mmj8-wcvw-6789"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49262"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T21:50:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/aimeos/pagible/security/advisories/GHSA-mmj8-wcvw-6789", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mmj8-wcvw-6789"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/aimeos/pagible/security-advisories/GHSA-mmj8-wcvw-6789", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/aimeos/pagible", "summary": "Aimeos Pagible CMS vulnerable to Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF) via DNS rebinding in admin proxy", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T21:50:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mmj8-wcvw-6789", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.10.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "aimeos/pagible"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.10.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Aimeos Pagible CMS vulnerable to Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF) via DNS rebinding in admin proxy
